message:
test(fcp-conformance/host-redaction): pin Redacted<T> + RedactionPolicy + redact_json forensic-safety contract (resolves flywheel_connectors-k3uke)

31 tests covering the cross-crate logging-redaction primitives:
exact '[REDACTED]' wire literal (Display + Debug), serde-transparent
value preservation, expose/into_inner/map round-trip, default-policy
baseline pattern set (15 documented secret-bearing field names),
case-insensitive substring should_redact semantics, redact_json
KEY-only inspection (value bodies left alone), whole-subtree
replacement at sensitive keys (object/array/numeric), recursion
through nested objects + arrays of objects, top-level primitive
preservation, idempotence, custom-policy isolation from baseline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
